task_description: Implement 7 enhancements to the existing agent-guard system: Read-Only Mode, Action-Level Permissions, Knowledge Auditor, Zero-Width Unicode Detection, README update, Prisma schema update, and API/UI updates. All changes are additive and must not break existing functionality.

verification.summary: npm run build passes with exit code 0. All 30 routes compile cleanly including the modified ones. No test framework in project, so test quality is N/A.
